meaning: n.宽阔的区域,宽阔,苍天,膨胀扩张
examples: Its expanse of red Indian sandstone and wavy ribbons of glass is beautiful.
The grass was like an expanse of gold, and below her the valley swam in golden mist.
She began to address more ambitious themes in her dances such as The Sea, in which her dancers invisibly agitated a huge expanse of silk, played upon by colored lights.
Of particular interest these days is the re-invigorated gold rush in that vast northern expanse.
Along the way, we passed a murky expanse of water with oily scum on the surface.
